name: orbitask
description: Space-themed Kanban project management with WhatsApp automation

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up postgres redis minio -d
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:migrate --prefix backend -- --force && npm run db:seed --prefix backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run infra:up && sleep 5 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
